message:
test(fcp-core): rotate cryptographic key material in enrollment and simulation test vectors

Update signing_kid_hex, encryption_kid_hex, and issuance_kid_hex values
in both enrollment and simulation CBOR test vector files. The previous
key material was generated during an earlier development cycle; these
refreshed vectors ensure tests exercise current key derivation paths
and prevent stale fixtures from masking regressions in enrollment
request construction and simulation request serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
